article_meta.title: Of Course, There's a Biden Connection to DC's Fecal Fiasco Here's Something the Media Is Trying to Keep Quiet About Goldman Sachs' Top..

reasoning: The model largely ignored the author’s actual column prose and instead flagged page furniture (aggregator headlines and an editor’s note), included a quoted, attributed phrase from another headline, missed clear bias within the author’s own prose, and used non-standard bias labels.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: At least one clear attribution violation: flagged the quoted, attributed phrase 'We Send Billions to Dead People' from another story’s headline. Other flagged items were not the author’s prose but not necessarily quoted.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Most flagged items are not the author’s connecting prose (aggregator headlines, editor’s note solicitations) and thus are not valid author-level bias instances for this article.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed multiple clear instances in the author’s prose (e.g., loaded adverb ‘stridently,’ evaluative ‘rings hollow,’ opinion-as-fact about the purpose of free speech and primacy of ‘common good,’ etc.).
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Used non-standard labels not in the allowed set (e.g., Editorializing/Loaded Language, Partisan Framing, Selective Omission, Appeal to Emotion, Confirmation Bias/Ideological Slant).
